goal: To assist user in determining their preferred date and time and rescheduling appointment based on their preferences. To achieve this, this agent need store appointment details once customer identifies the one they want to act on.

data.name: Get Appointment List
data.more_details: This tool is used to get Appointment List.

upcoming_appointment_list.name: upcoming_appointment_list
upcoming_appointment_list.description: retain the info of future appointments list.
upcoming_appointment_list.title: retain the info of future appointments list.

tools.tool_description: This tool is used to retrieve the provider’s list of available slots. It should be called after collecting the customer’s preferred date and time for rescheduling an appointment.

data.name: Get available slots list
data.more_details: This tool is used to retrieve the provider’s list of available slots. It should be called after collecting the customer’s preferred date and time for rescheduling an appointment.

data.name: adjust max_days

data.code: Context.setVariable("workflow_status", "Error: error happened while retrieving available slots.")
data.name: set action error
filter slot

preferred_time.name: preferred_time
preferred_time.description: The user's preferred time of day for scheduling a new appointment. This is an enum with valid values: AM or PM.
preferred_time.title: The user's preferred time of day for scheduling a new appointment. This is an enum with valid values: AM or PM.

specific_time.name: specific_time
specific_time.description: Time specified by the user to identify open time slots, for example, "3:00 PM".
specific_time.title: Time specified by the user to identify open time slots, for example, "3:00 PM".

preferred_weekday.name: preferred_weekday
preferred_weekday.description:
The user's preferred weekday for scheduling the appointment.
This is an enum with valid values: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.
preferred_weekday.title:
The user's preferred weekday for scheduling the appointment.
This is an enum with valid values: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.

max_days.name: max_days
max_days.description: max days used to get available slots, should be an Integer
max_days.title: max days used to get available slots, should be an Integer

appointment_id.name: appointment_id
appointment_id.description: The appointment ID of the selected appointment, set the value when user select an appointment from the appointment list.
appointment_id.title: The appointment ID of the selected appointment, set the value when user select an appointment from the appointment list.

start_date.name: start_date
start_date.description:
Set the value when asking the customer for their preferred date, and use it to get available slots. If the customer does not specify an start date, default it to today's date.
Customer can input any format of the date, you need follow the format as YYYY-MM-DD and convert the format if necessary.
start_date.title:
Set the value when asking the customer for their preferred date, and use it to get available slots. If the customer does not specify an start date, default it to today's date.
Customer can input any format of the date, you need follow the format as YYYY-MM-DD and convert the format if necessary.

workflow_status.description: To track the execution result in workflow
workflow_status.title: To track the execution result in workflow

available_provider_slots_list.name: available_provider_slots_list
available_provider_slots_list.description: Retain the information of all available provider slots.
available_provider_slots_list.title: Retain the information of all available provider slots.

start_date_utc.name: start_date_UTC
start_date_utc.description:
The start date of the selected slot by user from available slot list. After user identifies the slot, store start_date to this variable.
It should follow standard UTC format as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ
start_date_utc.title:
The start date of the selected slot by user from available slot list. After user identifies the slot, store start_date to this variable.
It should follow standard UTC format as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ
